nasb.text: a devout man and one who feared God with all his household, and gave many alms to the Jewish people and prayed to God continually.

esv.text: a devout man who feared God with all his household, gave alms generously to the people, and prayed continually to God.

cnv.text: 他是一個虔誠的人，他和全家都敬畏　神，對人民行過許多善事，常常向　神禱告。

ccb.text: 他和全家都是虔诚敬畏上帝的人，他慷慨周济穷人，常常祷告。

csbs.text: 他是个敬虔的人，与全家都敬畏神；他慷慨地周济民众，常常向神祷告。
